englishDefinitions: To depend on one actor, scene, idea, or element to make the entire movie succeed.
persianTranslation: کل فیلم را بر چیزی بنا کردن
موفقیت کل فیلم را به چیزی وابسته کردن
examples: The director decided to hang the whole movie on one strong performance.
You can't hang the whole movie on special effects alone.
They hung the whole movie on a single twist ending.
